name: 03_raw_within_range_returned_unchanged
description: Raw value sits strictly inside the [VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN, VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX] window; clamp returns it unchanged. Tests the linear pass-through regime where the dynamic value is preserved.
derivation: raw = -(1.0 * 1.5) = -1.5. min(-0.5, -1.5) = -1.5. max(-3.0, -1.5) = -1.5. -1.5 is strictly between VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN (-3.0) and VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX (-0.5), so neither clamp activates.
